summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Coming Soon shop features. All 10 test scenarios passed. Backend APIs (GET /api/products/stock, POST /api/products/notify, POST /api/contact) working correctly. Frontend shows Coming Soon badges, Notify Me buttons, notification modals, and inline forms on product detail pages. Quick View modal correctly shows 'Notify Me When Available' instead of 'Add to Cart'.

issues: Console warnings about missing DialogTitle and aria-describedby for accessibility - minor accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Shop page (/shop) shows 'Coming Soon' badge on all 4 product cards
Shop page product cards show 'Notify Me' button instead of 'Add to Cart'
Clicking 'Notify Me' on card opens notification modal with email input
Submitting email in notification modal successfully saves subscription (POST /api/products/notify)
Product detail page (/shop/parallettes) shows 'Coming Soon' badge, 'launching soon' message, and inline Notify Me form
Inline notification form on detail page accepts email and submits successfully
Quick View modal shows 'Notify Me When Available' instead of 'Add to Cart' for coming soon products
Backend API /api/products/stock returns all 4 products with coming_soon: true, stock: 20
Backend API /api/products/notify accepts email and product_id, prevents duplicates
Contact form (/contact) sends email via Brevo SMTP (POST /api/contact) - email_sent: true confirmed
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Quick View modal (ProductModal) should add DialogTitle and aria-describedby for better accessibility compliance
seed_data_creation: Test notification subscriptions created for: test_notify_123@example.com (parallettes), test_shop_modal@example.com (handstand-canes), test_detail_page@example.com (parallettes), test_duplicate_check@example.com (handstand-canes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Coming Soon shop features fully implemented and tested. Products in MongoDB product_stock collection with coming_soon: true and stock: 20. Notification subscriptions stored in product_notifications collection. Key data-testids: notify-btn-{id}, notify-modal-content, notify-email-input, notify-submit-btn, notify-modal-close, notify-inline-form, notify-inline-email, notify-inline-submit, modal-notify-btn, quick-view-{id}. Admin toggle endpoint: POST /api/products/stock/toggle?product_id=X&coming_soon=false to launch products and notify subscribers via Brevo SMTP.
